pdfs.title: Bill No. 29 - Bangsamoro Electoral Code of 2022
pdfs.description: An Act providing for the Bangsamoro Electoral Code of the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region in Muslim Mindanao, prescribing structural, functional and procedural principles in elections within BARMM.

pdfs.title: Bill No. 30 - Bangsamoro Local Governance Code
pdfs.description: An Act providing for the Bangsamoro Local Governance Code, establishing the framework for local governance within the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region.

pdfs.title: Bill No. 25 - Strengthening the Regional Transitional Justice and Reconciliation Program
pdfs.description: An Act strengthening the Regional Transitional Justice and Reconciliation Program for the Bangsamoro Autonomous Region.

pdfs.title: Bill No. 31 - Creating the Bangsamoro Regional Institute for Higher Islamic Studies
pdfs.description: An Act creating the Bangsamoro Regional Institute for Higher Islamic Studies, repealing Muslim Mindanao Autonomy Act No. 164 (Regional Madrasah Graduate Education Act of 2003).

pdfs.title: Bill No. 35 - Establishing a Bangsamoro Memorial Marker and Eco-Park in Camp Abubakar
pdfs.description: An Act establishing a Bangsamoro Memorial Marker and Eco-Park in Camp Abubakar, Municipality of Barira, Maguindanao to honor the Shuhada/Martyrs of the Bangsamoro struggle.
